heading: Radio station deemed government station
label: 3910 Radio station deemed government station
text: Any radio station, while assigned to authorized Coast Guard duty shall be deemed to be a radio station of the Coast Guard and a “government station” within the meaning of section 305 of the Communications Act of 1934 ().47 U.S.C. 305
notes: Historical and Revision NotesBased on title 14, U.S.C., 1946 ed., § 266b (, title I, § 7B, as added , ).Feb. 19, 1941, ch. 8Sept. 30, 1944, ch. 453, § 458 Stat. 760Changes were made in phraseology. 81st Congress, House Report No. 557.
